title: Xeraea martiana

The classification of Xeraea martiana reflects its evolutionary relationships within this complex and widespread plant family.

intro: Xeraea martiana, also known as Martiana, is a type of flowering plant species within the family Boraginaceae, native to the Andes mountain range. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory infections.
